description: Picks up AgentWorkforce/cloud issues labeled `small`, posts a handoff to Slack #proj-cloud (relayfile writeback), claims the issue with a comment (relayfile writeback), then spawns the cloud-small-issue-codex workflow inside the persona sandbox to draft a PR via codex (impl) + claude (reviewer).

SLACK_CHANNEL.description: Slack channel name to post handoff messages to.
